Process</b><div><b><br></b>1. Increase stocks (<b>INCR</b> stocks)<div>2. style="edgeLabel;html=1;align=center;verticalAlign=middle;resizable=0;points=[];fontSize=12;" value="<span style="font-size: 11px;"><b>(1)&nbsp;SETNX</b> sale:lock:userId</span><div style="text-align: left;"><span style="font-size: 11px;"><b>(2) DESC</b> stocks</span><br style="font-size: 11px;"></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" x="-0.0219" as="geometry"> <mxPoint as="offset" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zm6ztUFkHjwd8SbJCg5R-61" parent="1" style="rounded=1;html=1;fillColor=#fff2cc;dashed=1;dashPattern=8 8;strokeColor=#d6b656;strokeWidth=2;align=left;whiteSpace=wrap;spacingRight=8;spacingLeft=10;" value="<div><b>Consumer Service Design</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><div>- P<span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">rocesses orders and insert to DB (</span><span style="background-color: transparent; color: light-dark(rgb(0, 0, 0), rgb(255, 255, 255));">idempotently)</span></div><div>- Exponential backoff retries for x attempts</div><div>- After failed x attempts, push message to DLQ</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="300" x="1375" y="301" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="zm6ztUFkHjwd8SbJCg5R-62" parent="1" Limit</b></div><div><b><br></b></div><div><div>- anti-DDoSS</div><div>- ban suspicious IPs</div><div>- Prevent bots</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="110" width="130" x="575" y="565" Queue:</b><div><b><br></b>- Use SQS FIFO queue<div>- Group message by user_id</div></div>" vertex="1"> <mxGeometry height="96.75" width="200" x="1030" y="588.12" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> </root>
